title: External Secrets Workqueue Depth High
description: This monitor alerts when the workqueue depth is high, indicating that the controller is falling behind on reconciliation.

definition.name: [External Secrets] High Workqueue Depth for {{name.name}}
definition.message:
Workqueue `{{name.name}}` has a depth of {{value}} items, indicating the controller is falling behind on reconciliation.

To resolve:
1. Check if the controller is rate-limited or throttled by the provider API
2. Consider increasing concurrent reconciles
3. Check for a large number of newly created ExternalSecret resources
